Broken ARIA Reference Test Page

This page contains elements whose aria-labelledby or aria-describedby attributes reference IDs that do not exist in the document, triggering the "ARIA reference points to missing element" finding.

Search Widget

aria-labelledby="search-heading-label" — but id="search-heading-label" does not exist

User Profile Region

aria-describedby="profile-desc" — but id="profile-desc" does not exist

Name: Jane Doe

Role: Administrator

Submit Button

aria-labelledby="submit-label" — but id="submit-label" does not exist

Back to index
